Title: Idle Zoo World
Description: Idle resource management game where players build and manage their own zoo, attracting visitors and earning money to expand their collection of animals and facilities.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

media.url: https://dendefo.github.io/Idle Zoo World/IDLE Zoo World WebGL Build/index.html

Title: Glass Jam
Description: Merge-3 puzzle game where players pick up and merge glass pieces to clear levels and progress through the game.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Recycle Jam
Description: Merge-3 puzzle game where players pick up and merge bottles in the ocean to clear levels and progress through the game.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Myth Showdown
Description: Auto-battler game where players collect and upgrade characters based on mythological creatures and battle against other players in strategic matches.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Hex Flow
Description: Pixel flow-like puzzle game where players send colored rabbits to trays and try to clear hexagonal levels.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Coffee Go!
Description: Puzzle game where players click on colored cups inside trays to clear levels by sending them to the correct colored trays.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Hidden Match World
Description: Hidden object puzzle game where players search for hidden objects in levels, using a match mechanic inspired by Zen Match.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Spaceship Defense TD
Description: Tower defense game where players choose towers and upgrades for their ship to defend against waves of enemies.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Miasma
SubTitle: College Project
Description: 2.5D sidescroller Lovecraftian horror game where Marie, a ship captain's daughter, navigates a storm-wracked vessel while experiencing terrifying visions that blur reality and nightmare.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Chefhero
SubTitle: Extra-Curricular Project
Description: 2D bullet heaven sidescroller where a chef saves his restaurant from invading food monsters using kitchen utensils and cooking tools.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Horde Switch
SubTitle: Multiplayer powered by Photon Fusion
Description: 3D multiplayer card game where players constantly try to survive against enemies and outlive the opponent.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.

Title: Dead Lift
SubTitle: Global Game Jam Project
Description: Local multiplayer game about getting to the highest point of a zombie tower.
footer: Led production, pipeline development, and core game design.
